name: Oil-Dri Corp of America
summary: Oil-Dri Corporation of America is a leader in developing, manufacturing, and marketing sorbent products derived from hydrated aluminosilicate minerals including calcium bentonite, attapulgite, and diatomaceous shale. Principal products include branded and private label cat litter (Cat's Pride, Jonny Cat), industrial floor absorbents, fluids purification bleaching clays, agricultural chemical carriers (Agsorb, Verge), and animal health and nutrition solutions (Amlan brand). The company operates two segments: Retail and Wholesale Products Group and Business to Business Products Group, with operations in the U.S. and internationally.
